title: Language Change - Earbuds/Headsets and smart Charge Chase/Stand are out of date
scenario: Verify that after changing device language on a multi-component device with outdated firmware, the Language Change DFU updates all components to the latest firmware and applies the language change to the smart charge case.
steps: Ensure the device has multiple components (e.g., Earbuds with Charge Case or Headset with Charge Stand) all on outdated firmware.
Change the device language to a new language.
Tap 'Update Now' to initiate the update.
Observe that the software update screen is displayed.
Wait for the Language Change DFU to complete.
expected: All components should be updated to the latest firmware version, and the language on the smart charge case (Free 60+) should also change accordingly.
